title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
summary: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source agentic coding model with a Mixture-of-Experts architecture, one trillion parameters, and 256K context window. The accompanying Kimi Code CLI enables terminal-based repository exploration, file editing, command execution, and testing with plan mode for investigating codebases before making changes.
writeup: The video covers Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source agentic coding model built on a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with one trillion parameters and a 256K context window. It also walks through the Kimi Code CLI, which handles terminal-based repository exploration, file editing, command execution, and testing, plus a plan mode for investigating codebases before changes are made. The release matters because it pairs an open-weight, long-context coding model with a dedicated agentic terminal tool.
